## Summary

Describe the change and its motivation.

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Specification
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Implementation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Samples
- [ ] Maintenance

## Architectural impact

Identify affected Services, Ports, Adapters, Events, Capabilities,
Specifications, ADRs or RFCs.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No public contract changes
- [ ] Backward-compatible change
- [ ] Breaking change with migration guidance
- [ ] Not applicable

## Validation

- [ ] Project Principles reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests included or not applicable
- [ ] No sensitive spatial data included
- [ ] No proprietary material included
